name: Marshmallow Easter Eggs
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix gelatin and cold water. Set aside until water is absorbed.
2. Combine sugar, hot water, 1/2 cup of the Karo syrup and cook to the soft ball stage (240 degrees).
3. Cool a few minutes. Beat with mixer at full speed.
4. Add the remaining Karo syrup and all of the gelatin mixture, 1 tablespoon at a time, beating for 7 to 8 minutes after the last addition.
5. Add vanilla. Pour into a well greased 7 x 9 inches pan and chill thoroughly.
6. Dust hands with cornstarch. Spoon marshmallow out of pan and form eggs.
7. Brush excess cornstarch off and let dry for 1/2 hour on waxed paper.
8. Pour melted milk chocolate over eggs and let set. Refrigerate for easier handling.
